report.summary: Cycle-close: 2 new learn guides built (Governance Security Attack Vectors + Funding Rate Arbitrage) and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. EIP-7702 + Passkey Wallets promoted to PUBLISHED. TS errors stable at 142. Git locks Day 10 — 807 uncommitted files.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new PUBLISH_QUEUE pages confirmed: /learn/governance-security-attack-vectors-2026 and /learn/funding-rate-arbitrage-guide-2026 — both page.tsx present
Previous cycle's queue items (EIP-7702 + Passkey Wallets) successfully promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES

All 8 pages from today's batches 4-7 verified present: lido-v3-stvaults, institutional-crypto-adoption, cross-chain-messaging, onchain-gaming, solana-liquid-staking, corporate-crypto-treasury, eip-7702, passkey-wallets
Total TS errors stable at 142 (unchanged): lido-v3-stvaults (94), structured-data.examples (40), crypto-arbitrage-strategies (4), institutional-crypto-adoption (2), crypto-index-funds (2)
Published slugs: 519 entries / 502 unique (up from 517/500 — 2 new published + 2 new queue items)
17 duplicate slug entries in published-pages.ts — unchanged, cleanup still needed
103 published slugs missing page.tsx — unchanged carry-over
Build bypasses TS errors via ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core API routes present and configured: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (swr:120s), trending (swr:600s), fear-greed (swr:1200s), market-metrics (swr:120s), market-dominance (swr:600s)
defi-yields uses dynamic CACHE_DURATION variable for SWR — not a bug, uses template literal. Behavior correct.
Rate limiter coverage: only cache-stats and health routes use checkRateLimit — 0/6 core data routes covered (carry-over P1)
CoinGecko free tier risk persists — no API key configured
No code changes to API routes this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: Git lock files persist: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16) — DAY 10 of blocker
807 uncommitted files (up from 803 in v5 — 4 new files from 2 new guide pages)
48 files changed vs last commit (e999560) with 4,409 insertions / 3,464 deletions
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'
Deploy gap: ~170+ pages built locally but not live in production — Day 8 since last push
next.config.ts has ignoreBuildErrors: true — Vercel builds will bypass TS errors when eventually deployed
CRITICAL: Jefe must manually run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push
